start_time.description: Appointment start time in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset, for example 2026-04-03T10:00:00+02:00.

duration_minutes.description: Appointment duration in minutes. Defaults to 30 if not provided.

customer_name.description: Full name of the customer who is booking the appointment.

customer_phone.description: Customer phone number in international format when available.

service.description: Service type being booked, for example intro_call or consultation.

notes.description: Optional booking notes or extra context from the caller.
